comment: Forced withdrawal trigger conditions. A unit meeting any condition enters forced withdrawal: must move toward nearest map edge each turn but may still fire. May path around environmental hazards.

conditions.description: At least 1 engine hit and at least 1 gyro hit simultaneously
Any two torso locations (CT, LT, RT) have zero front armor
Placeholder — additional triggers from rulebook to be added

note: Conditions use a simple expression language evaluated by the PSR/forced withdrawal resolver. Each condition is checked at end of each phase. When any condition is true, the unit enters forced withdrawal. Full rulebook conditions pending.
